coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 5-group, 168-node closure.
validation: The Geometry Nodes output, including all non-manifold edge tubes and tetrahedral diagnostic markers, has exact topology and bounds. The supplied object applies a separate Bevel modifier after Geometry Nodes; that non-GN modifier is excluded from the fair VM comparison and documented with its full-stack evaluated counts.

materialParity.validation: The browser recognizes the authored two-node Background to Material Output contract generically, routes the exact 53,760-index flat.w group through MeshBasicMaterial, and rejects linked Background inputs instead of claiming unsupported procedural parity. A distinct GN-only authored Eevee reference and aligned WebGL capture have silhouette IoU 0.9917, but full-surface luminance MAE 0.7378 and mean delta +0.7315. The 200 large filament triangles visually occlude most of the 17,920 tiny flat.w diagnostic triangles, so the measured residual is dominated by the current filament/environment approximation; Background routing is supported, but whole-asset shader parity is not yet established.
